subcodes.first_line: O divinely-endowed son! I beseech God that thou mayest become, in the realm of the Lord and through the love of the Beloved of Bahá, even as Kay-Khusraw, a leader and guide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پور خداداد از خدا خواهم که در کشور یزدان بمهر دلبر بها کیخسرو شوی و رهبر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
